SATA OOB / PHY ref clock control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x154
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscrg_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31] sata_oob_clken rw 0x1 gates oob, pmalive, phy_ref
[30:10] - - - -
[9] hsp_sata_phy_bak_sel rw 0x0 0=PLL clk, 1=50M bak
[8:4] sata_oob_divsor rw 0x6 not used
[3:0] sata_phy_ref_clk_divsor rw 0x6 -
